welcomeSubtitle: A calm space to begin your journey with clear next steps.
loginSubtitle: Access your journey with ease and clarity.
registerSubtitle: Start with a simple, supportive first step.
homeSubtitle: A quick view of the next helpful step.
emptyDescription: This space will become more helpful as your journey grows.
errorTitle: We could not complete the request
errorDescription: Please try again. If it keeps happening, support can help.
journeyCardDescription: A clear summary of what matters most right now will appear here.
journeyLoadingDescription: We are gathering your current journey summary...
journeyEmptyTitle: Your journey is just getting started
journeyEmptyDescription: As you begin guided steps or sessions, this area will become more helpful.
welcomeCardDescription: Find the right specialist, follow your journey, and come back to what matters when you need it.
validationPassword: Enter a password with at least 6 characters.
validationDisplayName: Enter a name with at least 2 characters.
linkNoAccount: Do not have an account yet?
profileSubtitle: Your basic information as it supports your current journey.
profileNotFoundTitle: We could not load your profile
profileNotFoundDescription: The profile may not be fully set up yet. Please try again later.
practitionersSubtitle: Explore calmly and find the right fit for your current need.
profileAvailabilityHint: These times are an early availability preview. Booking will be added later.
matchingSubtitle: Answer a few quick questions and we will suggest relevant specialists.
matchingPrimaryConcern: What feels most important right now?
matchingResultSubtitle: These suggestions are based on your current answers and can help you start.
quickAccessDescription: Start from the flow that fits you best right now.
bookingSubtitle: Choose a time that feels right for you.
bookingSlotDescription: Available times are based on the specialist schedule.
bookingNoSlotsDescription: Try another specialist or check again later.
bookingConfirmSubtitle: Review your session details before confirming.
paymentsSubtitle: Track current and recent payment attempts.
paymentCheckoutSubtitle: Complete payment to secure your session.
paymentClientSecretNote: Payment requires in-app provider SDK. This baseline keeps the flow ready for integration.
paymentReturnDescription: We are confirming your payment result.
sessionBlockedNotJoinable: This session status does not allow joining.
sessionBlockedNotVideo: Joining is available for video sessions only in this baseline.
sessionBlockedTimeWindow: The join window is not open yet. Please check again near session time.
sessionBlockedNotPrepared: Room is not prepared yet. Use prepare first then retry join.
sessionBlockedUnknown: Joining is currently unavailable. Please try again shortly.
supportTicketsSubtitle: We are here to help you with booking, payments, and app issues.
supportCreateTicketSubtitle: Share your issue clearly and we will help as soon as possible.
prefillHintSupportContext: Some fields are prefilled from the flow you came from. You can edit them if needed.
supportEmptyDescription: If you need help, create a new support ticket.
supportMessagesEmptyDescription: Your conversation with support will appear here.
careChatRequestsSubtitle: Request a supportive direct conversation with your specialist.
careChatCreateSubtitle: Send a simple request and we will handle approval flow for you.
prefillHintCareChatContext: Request fields were prefilled from your current context. Feel free to adjust before submitting.
careChatEmptyDescription: Create a request when you need a direct care conversation.
careChatPendingConversationHint: Conversation will be available after approval.
careChatConversationEmptyDescription: When the conversation starts, messages will appear here.
careChatMessagePlaceholder: Write a message with calm and clarity
paymentReturnSuccessHint: Payment appears successful. Your session details are now ready.
paymentReturnFailedHint: Payment did not complete. You can retry payment from the session details.
paymentReturnPendingHint: Payment is still processing. Refresh status after a short wait.
